Name: Rebooked Platform
Description: Rebooked is a revenue recovery platform for appointment-based businesses. We help companies capture lost income caused by missed calls, no-shows, cancellations, and customers who don't return. Our system uses automation—primarily SMS and smart scheduling—to instantly respond to leads, confirm appointments, refill canceled slots, and re-engage past customers. Instead of businesses needing more staff or more marketing spend, Rebooked helps them make more money from the customers they already have.

Name: Rebooked Platform - Fixed Monthly
Description: Fixed monthly access fee for unlimited platform access including all automation features, messaging, and analytics.
